# `jsonschema-specifications`

{{ PyPI }} {{ Pythons }} {{ CI }} {{ ReadTheDocs }}

JSON support files from the [JSON Schema Specifications](https://json-schema.org/specification.html) (metaschemas, vocabularies, etc.), packaged for runtime access from Python as a [referencing-based Schema Registry](https://referencing.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/#referencing.Registry).

functions.name: jsonschema_specifications.tests.test_jsonschema_specifications.test_it_copes_with_dotfiles
documentation:
Ignore files like .DS_Store if someone has actually caused one to exist.

We test here through the private interface as of course the global has
already loaded our schemas.

documentation: Load all the JSON Schema specification's official schemas.
